seo.homeTitle: Curated Bodrum & Aegean villas, land and residences — BIEL Invest
seo.homeDescription: BIEL Invest: a hand-picked portfolio of properties for sale and rent across Bodrum, Yalıkavak and the Aegean coast.
seo.portfolioDescription: Browse villas, land, summer homes and residences. Filter by area, price and features.
seo.aboutDescription: Discreet advisory on Bodrum's finest properties—how we work and what drives our portfolio.
seo.contactDescription: Reach our team about listings or a bespoke search in Bodrum and the Aegean.

home.heroTitle: Curated properties in the heart of the Aegean
home.heroImageAlt: Aegean coast and curated luxury homes near Bodrum
home.heroSubtitle: In the heart of the Aegean, discover our hand-picked portfolio of Bodrum villas, land and residences.
home.regionsSubtitle: Every cove has its own spirit
home.aboutTitle: A privileged portfolio, a quiet advisory
home.aboutBody: For years we have connected the most distinctive properties of the Aegean coast with buyers who value discretion and detail. We know the character of each Bodrum village and curate our portfolio accordingly.

priceCurrency.hint: Rates are ECB-based and indicative. The listing amount is stored in the asset’s currency.

inquiry.title: Request information
inquiry.subtitle: We will get back to you shortly
inquiry.name: Full name
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: I would like more information about this property...
inquiry.success: Your request was received. We will be in touch shortly.
inquiry.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
inquiry.agree: I have read and accept the privacy policy.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Properties you saved
favorites.empty: You haven't saved any properties yet.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A reference in Bodrum's most exclusive properties
about.body: Drawing on years of expertise in Bodrum, we assemble the most distinctive properties of the region with care. We inspect each asset in person and ensure the right match between buyer and property.

taxonomy.title: Regions and property features
taxonomy.subtitle: Portfolio filters, the property form, and home region cards use these lists. Each row needs a unique id (lowercase, digits, underscore). Turkish label is required; if other locales are empty, Turkish is shown.
taxonomy.intro: Add regions or features; the order below is the order on the home page and in filters.
taxonomy.introHint: If you delete an id that existing listings still use, those listings keep the old id; labels may show as raw text until you fix the listing or restore the id.
taxonomy.regionHint: Optional: card image URL for the home page (defaults apply if empty).
taxonomy.featureHint: Use short English snake_case ids (e.g. sea_view) — they are used in code and query strings.
taxonomy.saveBarHint: After saving, text updates across the site in about a minute.
taxonomy.errorBadRegionId: Invalid region id: {id} (a–z, digits, underscore, up to 64 chars).

content.title: Site copy & images
content.subtitle: What visitors read and the big images (hero, about column, etc.). Listings are not here—use **Properties** for those.
content.introShort: Pick a page tab, then pick a language. Each language is stored separately; the site shows the text for the language the visitor selected.
content.editingLanguageHelp: Switch the language above to translate. Saving sends all languages you’ve filled in together.
content.saveBarHint: Changes can take up to about a minute to show on the live site.
content.urlPasteHint: Paste a URL, or use upload next to it.
content.tabDescHome: Homepage: full-screen image, top line, main headline, two buttons, then “featured”, “regions”, and the short about teaser.
content.tabDescAbout: The About page: top band, left large photo, right body text, three stat boxes (number + label).
content.tabDescContact: Contact page: headings and the address line. Phone and email still come from environment settings.
content.tabDescFavport: Favorites and the portfolio list page: only headings and empty-state text. Listing cards still come from Properties.
content.tabDescBrand: Site-wide: line under the logo, menu item labels, and footer line.
content.tabDescSeo: What Google and social previews use: a short page title and description for each public page.
content.sectionHeroHint: The first screen a visitor sees: big background, headline area, and optional small line in the lower corner.
content.sectionFeaturedHint: The section just under the hero on the home page—the text above the featured listing cards. Cards are from Properties.
content.sectionRegionsHint: Title and subtitle above the region tiles on the home page.
content.sectionHomeAboutHint: The short about block on the home page before the listings; the CTA can link to the full About page.
content.sectionAboutPageHint: About page layout: left image, right body; stats use the same numbers for every language, labels are translated below.
content.sectionStatsHint: Numbers are shared (e.g. 12+). Add translated labels in the three fields under them.
content.sectionContactHint: Contact page hero text and the address line next to the office block.
content.sectionFavHint: Headings and empty-state when there are no saved favorites yet.
content.sectionPortPageHint: Only the list page title, subtitle, “no results” line, and “Currency” label—not filter vocabulary.
content.sectionSeoHint: Meta title and description for search and link previews, per page and per language.
content.sectionBrandBlockHint: Name and line next to the logo, tagline, header caption — repeated on every page.
content.sectionNavBlockHint: Labels in the top horizontal bar (Home, Portfolio, …).
content.sectionFooterBlockHint: Bottom area: rights line, “Quick links” heading, small footer line.
content.secPortPage: Portfolio list page (headings only, not filters)

behavior.sectionEventMixHint: All recorded events in the selected window
behavior.title: Visitor behavior
behavior.subtitle: Last {days} days: page views, favorite clicks, and a live event stream. Tied to an anonymous browser id.
behavior.sectionTopGeoHint: Page views bucketed by country / region / city from edge headers (e.g. Vercel). Often empty in local dev.
behavior.emptyGeo: No location data yet (fills in production for new events).

properties.title: Properties
properties.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this property?
